title: FNAF Management Wanted: More Decor
description: FNAF: Management Wanted's Official Decor Addon! Adds 1/3 of the total decor that'll be in 1.0.0 !!
body:
[![](https://media.forgecdn.net/banner/console-affiliation-banners/banner_c2945574-825f-4a44-860b-9653d055501c.png)](https://ovdr.org/bisect)

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1498231/description_948b75ed-49da-4ee6-8a3a-f3946f418443.png)

**With the [main Management Wanted mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/management-wanted) transitioning to a different Minecraft version, we wanted to make our 1.20.1 decor work publicly available for everyone to enjoy. This mod adds 1/3 of the total decor that'll be in FNAF: Management Wanted 1.0.0**

**This mod was previously called "FNAF: Management Wanted 2" as it was our 2026 April Fools.**

***

# **ABOUT**
This mod adds tons of Five Nights at Freddy’s themed decor blocks for Creative Mode builders!

**This mod was made to pair with Management Wanted 1.3, though it is not mandatory.**

***

# **⚠️PLEASE NOTE**
**The build featured in this mod, while it is newer than 1.3.3, is still VERY VERY OLD!!!!**

**1.4 / 1.0 has changed a lot since this build, but we wanted to give our builders some newer decor while they wait for the full 1.0 release. Anything that isn't decor has been stripped from the mod.  
**

***
